e.p: How is the cash flow right now?
e.m: Nói nếu tiền đang vào hay ra; Nói nếu công ty có đủ tiền.
e.h: S + be + V-ing; I have / I need
e.s: Money is coming in now. I have enough cash.

e.p: Do you have regular income?
e.m: Nói tần suất có thu nhập; Nói nguồn thu chính (một từ).
e.h: S + V(s) + adv of freq; name a simple noun
e.s: We usually get income every month. Sales are the main source.

e.p: How many customers pay you each week?
e.m: Nói số khách hàng mỗi tuần; Nói nếu số đó là đủ (yes/no).
e.h: There are + number; use 'Yes' or 'No' with a short clause
e.s: There are five customers each week. Yes, that is enough.

e.p: Do you need more cash now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói lý do ngắn (một nguyên nhân).
e.h: I need / I don't need + N; give a short reason
e.s: I need more cash. I want to buy new stock.

e.p: Where do you keep the daily money?
e.m: Nói nơi giữ tiền; Nói nếu nơi đó an toàn hoặc không.
e.h: Prepositions (in/on/at); use 'It is' + adjective
e.s: We keep the cash in a safe. It is secure.

d.t: Kiểm tra thu chi hàng ngày

e.p: Is money coming in this morning?
e.m: Nói sáng nay có tiền vào không; Nói số tiền ngắn (ví dụ: little/much).
e.h: S + be + V-ing; use 'a little' or 'much'
e.s: Money is coming in this morning. We have a little cash.

e.p: How often do you pay bills?
e.m: Nói tần suất trả hoá đơn; Nói phương pháp trả (một từ).
e.h: S + V(s) + adv of freq; use 'by' or simple noun
e.s: We pay bills every month. We pay by bank.

e.p: How many bills do you have today?
e.m: Nói số hoá đơn hôm nay; Nói nếu bạn can pay them (yes/no).
e.h: There are + number; answer yes/no with short clause
e.s: There are three bills today. No, I cannot pay them now.

e.p: Do you need to save money this week?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói một việc bạn làm để tiết kiệm.
e.h: I need / I don't need + to V; short action
e.s: I need to save money this week. I will cut small costs.

e.p: Where is the cash register now?
e.m: Nói vị trí của két/thùng tiền; Nói nếu nó an toàn (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions in/on/at; use 'It is' + adjective
e.s: The cash register is near the door. It is not safe.

d.t: Nói về khoản thu hàng tháng

e.p: What is your monthly income?
e.m: Nói tổng thu nhập hàng tháng (dùng số đơn giản); Nói nếu đó là tốt (yes/no).
e.h: Use a number word and 'a month'; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: My monthly income is five thousand. Yes, it is good.

e.p: Do you usually get income on time?
e.m: Nói tần suất đúng hạn; Nói một lý do ngắn nếu chậm.
e.h: adv of freq + S + V(s); short reason with 'because'
e.s: We usually get income on time. Sometimes it is late because of bank.

e.p: How many invoices are paid monthly?
e.m: Nói số hoá đơn trả mỗi tháng; Nói nếu số đó ổn (one short sentence).
e.h: There are + number; 'It is' + adjective
e.s: There are ten invoices each month. It is okay.

e.p: Do you want more regular customers?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói một việc bạn làm để có khách (to V).
e.h: I want / I don't want + to V; short activity
e.s: I want more regular customers. I will ask for referrals.

e.p: Where does most income come from?
e.m: Nói nguồn chính; Nói nếu nguồn đó ổn định (yes/no).
e.h: Simple noun for source; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: Most income comes from sales. Yes, it is stable.

d.t: Quản lý chi tiêu hằng ngày

e.p: What are you buying today?
e.m: Nói một món bạn mua hôm nay; Nói nếu nó cần (I need/want).
e.h: There are / I need / I want + N
e.s: I am buying paper today. I need it for invoices.

e.p: Do you pay suppliers now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói lý do ngắn (because/of).
e.h: I am / I am not + V-ing; use 'because' short
e.s: I am paying suppliers now. I do it because they deliver goods.

e.p: How much do you spend on transport weekly?
e.m: Nói một con số đơn giản; Nói nếu đó là nhiều hay ít (a lot/a little).
e.h: Use a number and 'a week'; use 'a lot' or 'a little'
e.s: I spend ten dollars a week. It is a little.

e.p: Do you often buy food for the office?
e.m: Nói tần suất; Nói who pays (one word: I/we).
e.h: adv of freq + S + V(s); use 'I' or 'We'
e.s: We often buy food for the office. We pay for it.

e.p: Where do you keep receipts?
e.m: Nói chỗ để hoá đơn; Nói nếu bạn check them (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We keep receipts in a box. Yes, we check them.

e.p: When do you pay rent?
e.m: Nói thời gian trả tiền thuê (ngày/tháng); Nói nếu bạn always on time.
e.h: Use 'on' or 'every' + time; adv of freq
e.s: We pay rent on the first day of the month. We are always on time.

e.p: Do you have enough money for salaries?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói số nhân viên (There are).
e.h: Yes/No + short clause; There are + number + staff
e.s: No, I do not have enough money for salaries. There are three staff.

e.p: How many days do you wait to pay an invoice?
e.m: Nói số ngày; Nói nếu đó là hợp lý (yes/no).
e.h: Use number + days; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We wait thirty days to pay an invoice. Yes, that is reasonable.

e.p: Do you want to pay early sometimes?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói một lý do ngắn nếu có.
e.h: I want / I don't want + to V; short reason
e.s: I want to pay early sometimes. It helps our suppliers.

e.p: Where do you plan payments each month?
e.m: Nói nơi lập kế hoạch; Nói nếu bạn write them down (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We plan payments in an office notebook. Yes, we write them down.

e.p: Are you checking stock now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói số mặt hàng cần kiểm tra.
e.h: S + be + V-ing; There are + number + items
e.s: I am checking stock now. There are twenty items to check.

e.p: How often do you order new stock?
e.m: Nói tần suất đặt hàng; Nói ai đặt (I/we).
e.h: adv of freq + S + V; use I or We
e.s: We order new stock every month. We place the orders.

e.p: Do you need cash to buy more stock?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói số tiền ngắn (a little/a lot).
e.h: I need / I don't need + N; use 'a lot' or 'a little'
e.s: I need cash to buy more stock. I need a lot of money.

e.p: How many boxes are in the warehouse?
e.m: Nói số hộp; Nói nếu số đó là đủ.
e.h: There are + number; 'It is' + adjective
e.s: There are fifty boxes in the warehouse. It is enough.

e.p: Where do you put new items?
e.m: Nói vị trí đặt hàng mới; Nói nếu vị trí gần cửa (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We put new items on the back shelf. No, it is not near the door.

e.p: Is the customer paying now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói cách thanh toán (cash/card).
e.h: S + be + V-ing; use 'cash' or 'card'
e.s: The customer is paying now. They pay by cash.

e.p: Do you often give change?
e.m: Nói tần suất; Nói một ví dụ số tiền thối (small number).
e.h: adv of freq + S + V; use a small number
e.s: We often give change. For example, we give two dollars.

e.p: How many customers buy on credit?
e.m: Nói số khách hàng mua chịu; Nói nếu điều đó ok (yes/no).
e.h: There are + number; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: There are two customers who buy on credit. No, it is not ok.

e.p: Do you want a deposit from customers?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói số tiền đặt cọc ngắn (a little/much).
e.h: I want / I don't want + N; use 'a little' or 'a lot'
e.s: I want a deposit from customers. I want a little money.

e.p: Where do customers sign receipts?
e.m: Nói vị trí ký; Nói nếu bạn keep the receipts (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: Customers sign receipts on the desk. Yes, we keep the receipts.

d.t: Tương tác với nhà cung cấp

e.p: Is the supplier delivering today?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói số kiện hàng đơn giản.
e.h: S + be + V-ing; There are + number + packages
e.s: The supplier is delivering today. There are three packages.

e.p: How often do you order from this supplier?
e.m: Nói tần suất; Nói if you like them (I like/I don't like).
e.h: adv of freq + S + V; use I like / I don't like
e.s: We order from this supplier every month. I like them.

e.p: Do you pay the supplier on delivery?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói cách bạn trả (cash/card/bank).
e.h: Yes/No + short clause; use simple payment word
e.s: No, we do not pay on delivery. We pay by bank.

e.p: How many items are in the delivery?
e.m: Nói số mặt hàng; Nói nếu số đó đủ (yes/no).
e.h: There are + number; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: There are twenty items in the delivery. Yes, that is enough.

e.p: Where do you meet the supplier?
e.m: Nói địa điểm gặp; Nói if it is near your shop (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We meet the supplier at the shop entrance. Yes, it is near our shop.

d.t: Lưu trữ và an toàn tiền mặt

e.p: Are you locking the safe now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói ai khóa (I/we).
e.h: S + be + V-ing; use I or We
e.s: I am locking the safe now. I lock it every night.

e.p: Do you often check the cash box?
e.m: Nói tần suất; Nói một hành động kiểm tra ngắn.
e.h: adv of freq + S + V; short action with to V
e.s: We often check the cash box. We count money every evening.

e.p: How many keys do you have for the safe?
e.m: Nói số chìa khoá; Nói nếu number is enough (yes/no).
e.h: There are + number; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: There are two keys for the safe. Yes, that is enough.

e.p: Do you need a new lock?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói một lý do ngắn nếu có.
e.h: I need / I don't need + N; short reason
e.s: I need a new lock. The old lock is broken.

e.p: Where do you put the spare key?
e.m: Nói vị trí đặt chìa khóa dự phòng; Nói nếu nó near the safe.
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No short clause
e.s: We put the spare key in a drawer. No, it is not near the safe.

d.t: Báo cáo ngắn về thanh khoản

e.p: Is your account balance low?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói con số mô tả (a little/much).
e.h: Yes/No + short clause; use 'a little' or 'a lot'
e.s: Yes, our account balance is low. We have a little money.

e.p: How often do you check the bank balance?
e.m: Nói tần suất; Nói who checks it (I/we).
e.h: adv of freq + S + V; use I or We
e.s: We check the bank balance every day. I check it in the morning.

e.p: Do you want to move money to savings?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói số tiền ngắn (a little/a lot).
e.h: I want / I don't want + to V; use 'a little' or 'a lot'
e.s: I want to move money to savings. I will move a little each week.

e.p: How many accounts do you have?
e.m: Nói số tài khoản; Nói if you use them (yes/no).
e.h: There are + number; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: There are two accounts. Yes, we use both.

e.p: Where do you record the balance?
e.m: Nói nơi ghi sổ; Nói if you update it daily (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We record the balance in a notebook. Yes, we update it daily.

d.t: Chuẩn bị cho ngày bán hàng lớn

e.p: Are you ready for the sale day?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói một việc bạn đang làm để chuẩn bị.
e.h: S + be + V-ing; use present continuous
e.s: We are ready for the sale day. We are arranging the display.

e.p: How much extra cash do you need?
e.m: Nói số tiền ngắn (a little/a lot); Nói để làm gì (one short reason).
e.h: Use 'a little' or 'a lot'; use 'to' + V
e.s: I need a little extra cash. It is to buy more bags.

e.p: Do you often have busy sale days?
e.m: Nói tần suất; Nói if you need more staff (yes/no).
e.h: adv of freq + S + V; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We often have busy sale days. Yes, we need more staff.

e.p: How many registers will you use?
e.m: Nói số quầy tính; Nói if that number is enough.
e.h: There are / We will use + number; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We will use three registers. Yes, that is enough.

e.p: Where will you keep extra cash on sale day?
e.m: Nói vị trí giữ tiền thêm; Nói if it is safe (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We will keep extra cash in a locked box. Yes, it is safe.

d.t: Lên kế hoạch thanh toán khẩn cấp

e.p: Is there an emergency payment today?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói số tiền ngắn (a little/a lot).
e.h: Yes/No + short clause; use 'a little' or 'a lot'
e.s: Yes, there is an emergency payment today. It is a little money.

e.p: How often do emergencies happen?
e.m: Nói tần suất; Nói một ví dụ ngắn (one reason).
e.h: adv of freq; short reason with 'because'
e.s: Emergencies sometimes happen. They happen because of quick repairs.

e.p: Do you need to move money now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói từ đâu lấy (bank/cash).
e.h: I need / I don't need + to V; use bank or cash
e.s: I need to move money now. I will take it from the bank.

e.p: How many emergency funds do you have?
e.m: Nói số quỹ khẩn cấp; Nói if it is enough (yes/no).
e.h: There are + number; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: There is one emergency fund. No, it is not enough.

e.p: Where do you note emergency expenses?
e.m: Nói nơi ghi chi khẩn cấp; Nói if you check it weekly (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We note emergency expenses in a small book. Yes, we check it weekly.

d.t: Thanh toán lương và phúc lợi

e.p: Are you paying salaries this week?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói số nhân viên được trả.
e.h: S + be + V-ing; There are + number
e.s: We are paying salaries this week. There are three staff paid.

e.p: Do you always pay on time?
e.m: Nói tần suất; Nói lý do ngắn nếu trễ.
e.h: adv of freq; short reason with 'because'
e.s: We usually pay on time. Sometimes we are late because of bank.

e.p: How much do you pay per person?
e.m: Nói một con số ngắn; Nói if it is fair (yes/no).
e.h: Use a number and 'per person'; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We pay two hundred per person. Yes, it is fair.

e.p: Do you want to give a bonus?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói số tiền ngắn nếu có.
e.h: I want / I don't want + to V; give a small amount
e.s: I want to give a bonus. I will give fifty.

e.p: Where do employees sign their pay slip?
e.m: Nói vị trí ký; Nói if you keep a copy (yes/no).
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: Employees sign pay slips at the counter. Yes, we keep a copy.

d.t: Ôn tập: Kiểm tra tổng quan 1

e.p: Is cash coming in and are bills due today?
e.m: Trả lời hai phần: tiền có vào không; hoá đơn có đến hạn không.
e.h: Use 'is/are + V-ing' and Yes/No short clause
e.s: Money is coming in now. Yes, some bills are due today.

e.p: How many customers and invoices do you handle weekly?
e.m: Nói số khách hàng; Nói số hoá đơn ngắn.
e.h: There are + number; keep both numbers simple
e.s: There are five customers each week. There are ten invoices weekly.

e.p: Do you need more cash and do you want more customers?
e.m: Trả lời hai phần: cần tiền thêm không; muốn thêm khách không.
e.h: I need / I don't need; I want / I don't want
e.s: I need more cash. I want more customers.

e.p: Where do you keep cash and where do you record sales?
e.m: Nói nơi giữ tiền; Nói nơi ghi doanh số ngắn.
e.h: Prepositions; short nouns
e.s: We keep cash in a safe. We record sales in a notebook.

e.p: How often do you check stock and do you pay suppliers on time?
e.m: Nói tần suất kiểm kho; Trả lời có/không về trả nhà cung cấp.
e.h: adv of freq; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We check stock every week. No, we do not always pay suppliers on time.

d.t: Ôn tập: Kiểm tra tổng quan 2

e.p: Are you saving money and moving funds to savings?
e.m: Trả lời hai phần: có tiết kiệm không; có chuyển tiền không.
e.h: I am / I am not + V-ing; I move / I don't move
e.s: I am saving money now. I move a little to savings each week.

e.p: How many accounts and keys do you have?
e.m: Nói số tài khoản; Nói số chìa khoá.
e.h: There are + number; keep numbers simple
e.s: There are two accounts. There are two keys.

e.p: Do you check bank balance daily and do you update records?
e.m: Trả lời hai phần: check balance daily (yes/no); update records (yes/no).
e.h: Yes/No + short clause; use 'daily' and 'update'
e.s: Yes, we check the bank balance daily. Yes, we update records.

e.p: Where do you keep receipts and do you keep copies of pay slips?
e.m: Nói nơi để hoá đơn; Trả lời có/không về giữ bản sao.
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We keep receipts in a box. Yes, we keep copies of pay slips.

e.p: How often do emergencies happen and do you have one fund?
e.m: Nói tần suất sự cố; Nói có quỹ khẩn cấp không.
e.h: adv of freq; There is / There are
e.s: Emergencies sometimes happen. There is one emergency fund.

d.t: Ôn tập: Tình huống thực tế

e.p: Is a customer paying by card and do you give change?
e.m: Trả lời hai phần: khách trả bằng thẻ không; bạn có trả tiền thừa không.
e.h: S + be + V-ing; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: The customer is paying by card. No, we do not give change for card.

e.p: How many staff do you pay and do you give a bonus?
e.m: Nói số nhân viên; Trả lời có/không về thưởng và số tiền nếu có.
e.h: There are + number; I want / I don't want + amount
e.s: There are three staff. I want to give a bonus of fifty.

e.p: Do you need cash for a sale and where will you keep it?
e.m: Trả lời có/không cần tiền; Nói vị trí giữ tiền ngắn.
e.h: I need / I don't need; Prepositions
e.s: I need cash for the sale. I will keep it in a locked box.

e.p: How often do you order and do you check deliveries?
e.m: Nói tần suất đặt hàng; Trả lời có/không về kiểm tra hàng.
e.h: adv of freq; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We order every month. Yes, we check deliveries.

e.p: Where do you record expenses and do you check them weekly?
e.m: Nói nơi ghi chi phí; Trả lời có/không về kiểm tra hàng tuần.
e.h: Prepositions; Yes/No + short clause
e.s: We record expenses in a notebook. Yes, we check them weekly.
